meaning: adj.温顺的,谦恭的,(河流等)和缓的,驯服的
examples: On the surface she seemed meek, rather insipid.
He expected his daughters to be meek and submissive.
Meek is a distant third, with Crist within striking distance in our latest Zogby telephone survey.
The numbers from the WFTS-ABC poll were Rubio 39%, Crist 33% and Meek 18%.
